# PRD

## Problem
CAD layer names need consistent comparison.

## Scope
Normalize layer names for comparison.

## Non-Goals
No renderer rewrite.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Layer names are trimmed before comparison.

## Approval
Human approval is required before design.
